description: Original Requested Execution Date: Only one of Date (Dt) or DateTime (DtTm) is allowed.
errorMessage: Only one of Date (Dt) or DateTime (DtTm) is allowed
fix: Remove one of the tags from the <OrgnlReqdExctnDt> block.

description: OrgnlReqdColltnDt is a simple ISODate field (not a choice). It must contain a direct YYYY-MM-DD value with no child elements.
errorMessage: Invalid OrgnlReqdColltnDt value. Must be a plain ISO date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. 2026-03-30). Do NOT wrap in <Dt> or <DtTm> child tags.

description: OrgnlReqdExctnDt and OrgnlReqdColltnDt are mutually exclusive in camt.055 TxInf. Only ONE date type is permitted per transaction cancellation request.
errorMessage: Both OrgnlReqdExctnDt and OrgnlReqdColltnDt are present. These are mutually exclusive — only ONE is allowed per ISO 20022 camt.055 schema.
fix: Remove either OrgnlReqdExctnDt or OrgnlReqdColltnDt. Keep only the one that matches the original payment instruction.
